PROJECT.NAME: Matcha Dating Web App
PROJECT.GOAL: Build a complete dating website from scratch that connects users from registration to real-life meeting. The application MUST be production-ready, secure, mobile responsive and contain NO warnings or errors.

TECH_STACK_CONSTRAINTS.BACKEND: Use a micro-framework only. Allowed examples: Express, Flask, Sinatra, Scalatra, Slim, Goji, Spark, Crow. No full frameworks with ORM or user management built-in.
TECH_STACK_CONSTRAINTS.DATABASE: Must be relational or graph DB. Allowed: PostgreSQL, MySQL, MariaDB, Neo4j, Cassandra, InfluxDB. Queries MUST be written manually (no ORM). Database must contain at least 500 generated user profiles for evaluation.
TECH_STACK_CONSTRAINTS.FRONTEND: Allowed: React / Vue / Angular / Bootstrap / Semantic UI or combination.
TECH_STACK_CONSTRAINTS.SERVER: Apache, Nginx or built-in server allowed.

SECURITY_REQUIREMENTS.PASSWORDS: Must be hashed (bcrypt or argon2). Never store plain passwords. Reject common passwords.
SECURITY_REQUIREMENTS.ENVIRONMENT_VARIABLES: Store all secrets in .env file. .env must be excluded from git.

AUTHENTICATION.REGISTER:
Required fields: - email - username - first name - last name - secure password
After registration: Send email verification link with unique token.
AUTHENTICATION.LOGIN: Login via username + password. Logout available from any page.
AUTHENTICATION.PASSWORD_RESET: Send reset email with secure token.

CORE_FEATURES.USER_PROFILE:
Required editable fields: - gender - sexual orientation - biography - interests as reusable tags (#vegan #geek etc) - up to 5 photos - 1 main profile photo
Users can update: - email - first name - last name - location
Features: - see who viewed profile - see who liked profile - public popularity score
CORE_FEATURES.LOCATION_SYSTEM: Use GPS with user consent. If refused: user must manually input city/area. User can edit location anytime.
CORE_FEATURES.MATCHING_ALGORITHM:
Must suggest profiles based on: - sexual orientation compatibility - geographic proximity (priority) - number of shared tags - popularity score
Default orientation if unspecified: bisexual.
Suggested profiles must be: - sortable by age, location, popularity, tags - filterable by same criteria
CORE_FEATURES.ADVANCED_SEARCH:
Filters: - age range - popularity range - location - tags
Results must be sortable + filterable.
CORE_FEATURES.PROFILE_VIEW:
Show all info except email/password.
Must track: - profile visit history
Actions: - Like profile photo (requires own photo) - Unlike profile - Show popularity score - Show online status / last seen - Report fake account - Block user (removes from search + chat)
Show clearly: - if liked - if matched
CORE_FEATURES.MATCH_SYSTEM: Match occurs when 2 users like each other. Only matched users can chat. If unlike -> chat disabled.
CORE_FEATURES.REALTIME_CHAT: Real-time messaging between matched users. Max delay: 10 seconds. New message indicator visible from any page.
CORE_FEATURES.REALTIME_NOTIFICATIONS:
Notify when: - receive like - profile viewed - new message - mutual like (match) - someone unlikes you
Must appear within 10 seconds. Must be visible from any page. Must track unread notifications.

POPULARITY_SCORE: You must define a consistent algorithm. Suggested formula: + profile views + likes received + matches + activity level
DATABASE_SCHEMA_MINIMUM: Tables required: - users - email_verification_tokens - password_reset_tokens - profiles - photos - tags - user_tags - likes - matches - messages - notifications - profile_views - blocks - reports
UI_REQUIREMENTS: Must be: - modern - responsive - intuitive - mobile friendly
BONUS_FEATURES: Implement only AFTER core is perfect: - OAuth login (Google, 42, GitHub) - Drag & drop photo gallery - Basic image editing (crop/rotate/filter) - Interactive map of users - Audio/video chat - Real-life dating event planner
EVALUATION_RULES: Project fails if: - any security vulnerability exists - any warning/error appears in console - mandatory features missing
DELIVERABLE: Generate FULL project including: - backend API - frontend UI - database schema + seed (500 users) - authentication flows - matching algorithm - realtime chat + notifications - deployment instructions
